## EXEMPLAR: SecureFlow DPIA (v1.2)

**App Name:** SecureFlow
**Stack:** Next.js, Firebase Auth, Firestore

### 1. Data Processing Scope
SecureFlow processes professional project data for creative agencies. This includes user identities (emails), project metadata, and uploaded assets. 

### 2. High-Risk Indicators
- **Large Scale Processing:** >10,000 active users.
- **Sensitive Content:** Client intellectual property stored in Firestore.

### 3. Necessity & Proportionality
Processing is limited to the minimum fields required for authentication and project delivery. Data retention is set to project lifetime + 1 year.

### 4. Technical Safeguards
- **Access Control:** User-scoped Firestore Security Rules strictly enforced.
- **Encryption:** AES-256 at rest via GCP; TLS 1.3 in transit.
osa_ra:
## EXEMPLAR: SecureFlow Children's Risk Assessment

**App Context:** Professional collaboration tool for designers (Ages 13+).

### 1. Identified Risks
| Threat | Likelihood | Impact | Mitigation |
|:---|:---|:---|:---|
| Grooming via Chat | Low | Critical | AI flagging on all workspace messages |
| Content Harm | Medium | High | Automated 'Sensitivity Check' on AI generations |
| Data Privacy | Medium | Medium | COPPA/GDPR-K compliant sign-up flow |

### 2. Effectiveness Statement
The combination of hard AV gates for new accounts and Gemini-powered sentiment analysis on UGC provides a robust defense for student talent using the platform.
osa_tos:
## EXEMPLAR: SecureFlow Terms of Service (OSA Update)

### 9. USER SAFETY & OFCOM COMPLIANCE
SecureFlow takes a zero-tolerance approach to illegal content. 

**9.1 Reporting:** Users can flag content at any time via the 'Report Harm' button.
**9.2 Automated Moderation:** We use Gemini 1.5 Flash to automatically screen all project briefs for prohibited materials.
**9.3 Sanctions:** Non-compliant users will have their access suspended within 24 hours of a verified breach.
